title: Devpilot deliverable closure
objective: Complete Devpilot current remaining work until deliverable-ready.
source_evidence: git status --short shows active P8 task-pull API, CLI, docs, and .agent-board changes plus unrelated .zcode/
.agent-board/board.json marks S001 done and all S001 todos done or verified
.agent-board/reviews/REV-001-review.json reports no findings for scoped API/CLI task-pull contract review
.agent-board/verification/VER-001-verification.json aggregates passed focused API/CLI verification logs
docs-internal/devpilot/progress/INDEX.md points P8 to P8-ops-governance.md through F374
docs-internal/todos/INDEX.md points active Devpilot work to 2026-06-25-existing-project-onboarding.md plus relevant P*.md
docs-internal/devpilot/progress/P8-ops-governance.md current status names remaining product/runtime gaps
CodeGraph status is initialized=false, so slice graphing must use scoped rg/safe-read
completion_standard: Current identifiable backlog is empty or only explicit external blockers remain.
Every completed slice has verification logs, review result, integration result, and docs sync.
Final answer gives a direct deliverable/not-deliverable judgment with residual risks.
worker_policy: One active write worker in this checkout at a time.
Read-only Architect/Reviewer/Verifier work may run in parallel when it cannot edit source.
Workers complete only their assigned slice and must not create recursive continuation workers.
